summary: This decline is a byproduct of DOB's multi-year migration of filings out of its legacy Building Information System (BIS) into the newer DOB NOW portal. As DOB requires most new filings to go through DOB NOW instead, the pool of jobs still in BIS - and therefore the resubmission reviews counted under this older system - has been shrinking each year.

sources.label: DOB, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: decreasing as DOB migrates filings from its legacy system to DOB NOW
